issues.title: Allow BedrockProxyChatModel to use AWS default region configuration

comments.body:
@yargna, perhaps we need to change the `spring.ai.bedrock.aws.region` to be empty by default, which will [bring the default region](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/cd3fc2f816b6039065da11134d2dc6d2058e498d/auto-configurations/models/spring-ai-autoconfigure-model-bedrock-ai/src/main/java/org/springframework/ai/model/bedrock/autoconfigure/BedrockAwsConnectionConfiguration.java#L70).

As a workaround you can set  `spring.ai.bedrock.aws.region=` to achieve the same?

@tzolov @ashakirin Thanks a lot for fixing it! I can confirm that with 1.0.0 I didn't have to use the above workaround anymore, it just worked out of the box. I can also see the code changes, and they look good

Also, I can confirm that I didn't set `spring.ai.bedrock.aws.region` property at all in the past.
